subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the beauty of Thy countenance whereby Thou hast shed light upon all contingent beings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بحسن جمالک الذی به اشرقت علی الممکنات من ظهورات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
